key_decisions: Doc-only commit (one JSON checkpoint). Ran the full check suite anyway because bug-check's contract is project-wide — but the only changes that could break anything were anti-pattern/secret/JSON-schema, all clean.

Container started with no node_modules in either root or site/. Ran `npm install` in both before build/test. Both installs were fast (6s + ~few s) with no advisory output beyond pre-existing site moderate warnings.
Test count matched the 2026-05-06 baseline (108/108) — no regression and no new test coverage expected from a checkpoint-only change.
ESLint remains skipped (no eslint config in repo); astro check via build is the linting signal.
